// Fixture for TestNoGracefulNilInRequestPaths.
//
// This file is .go.txt (not .go) so `go test` and `go build` don't compile
// it. The walker parses it from disk as raw source.
//
// ILLEGAL: a saga step's request-path body silently returns success when
// its dependency is nil. This is the one-code-path anti-pattern the test
// exists to prevent. The walker MUST flag it.

package flows

import "context"

type fakeDeps struct {
	Stripe *struct{}
	FGA    *struct{}
}

type illegalStep struct {
	deps fakeDeps
}

// Provision should always run when the step is registered. A nil dep
// must fail startup, never silently skip at request time.
func (s *illegalStep) Provision(ctx context.Context) (bool, error) {
	if s.deps.Stripe == nil {
		// ANTI-PATTERN: silent skip. Walker must flag THIS line.
		return true, nil
	}
	return true, nil
}

// Deprovision has the same anti-pattern in a different shape.
func (s *illegalStep) Deprovision(ctx context.Context) error {
	if s.deps.FGA == nil {
		// ANTI-PATTERN: silent skip. Walker must flag THIS line too.
		return nil
	}
	return nil
}
